title: How to find your real risk appetite? Experts explain how to identify it and build the right portfolio
summary: Experts suggests that an investor's risk appetite depends on financial capacity and emotional comfort with risk. Assess your income, savings, liabilities, age, and ability to handle market volatility. Together, these factors help determine the level of risk you can sustain over the long term.

title: Dearness Allowance: Here's why AIDEF is demanding a change in the DA calculation formula
summary: DA hike: The AIDEF has requested the 8th pay commission to revise how dearness allowance is calculated, arguing the current formula fails to reflect true living costs and inflation pressures on government employees and pensioners.

title: Bank holiday today: Are bank operations across India closed on 27 June for fourth Saturday off? Check RBI calendar here
summary: Public and private banks in India will be closed today, 27 June, for the fourth Saturday holiday. Operations are halted nationwide, but online banking services will remain accessible for transactions.

title: Not satisfied with your tax assessment? You can use Form 35 to file an appeal — Check process, fees, other details
summary: Taxpayers dissatisfied with income tax orders can file an appeal using Form 35. This process requires submitting relevant documentation and fees, and the appeal must be filed within 30 days of receiving the order. Full details here.

title: Zerodha launches India's first life cycle funds: Know how the 2 new schemes work, minimum investment, and suitability
summary: Zerodha Fund House has launched the life cycle fund series, becoming the first AMC to offer target-date mutual funds in the Indian mutual fund industry. The life cycle fund category was introduced by SEBI in February 2026.

title: Lost money in an online fraud? Here's how much you can recover under RBI's new rules and who pays
summary: Starting January 1, 2027, RBI's new guidelines will protect consumers from small-value digital fraud, allowing compensation up to ₹25,000 for victims. Details here.

title: EPFO services on official portal unavailable from today: Check affected services, restoration date and other details
summary: Starting June 26, EPFO services on member and employer portals, and the Umang app will be unavailable due to system migration, which aims to enhance service reliability. Check affected services, restoration date among other details.

title: Indore to Navi Mumbai: Top 5 cleanest cities in India and their cost of living
